unavailable.title: This workspace is currently unavailable.
unavailable.text: The workspace does not exist, does not belong to your account, or is no longer available. Private details are intentionally not shown here.

header.title: Your Operating Agreement
header.text: Capture how you want to work together, make decisions, and handle tension. This is a working document, not a contract.

status.title: Workspace prepared
status.v1Notice: This V1 workspace does not finalize anything yet: no advisor approval, no export, no versioning, and no change to the old invitation-based workbook.

editor.title: Your Operating Agreement
editor.text: Capture how you want to work together, make decisions, and handle tension.
editor.notesPlaceholder: Thoughts, open points, or examples from your conversation.
editor.agreementPlaceholder: What should apply between you from now on?

roles.title: Roles & responsibilities
roles.description: Capture who leads which topics and where early visibility matters.

commitment.title: Time & commitment
commitment.description: Describe what is realistically available and how you notice overload early.

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.description: Clarify what one person can decide alone and when both of you are needed.

conflict.title: Conflict & clarification
conflict.description: Define how you raise tension early, fairly, and in a way you can handle.

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Define how important things stay visible before everyday work buries them.

equity_conversation.title: Equity conversation
equity_conversation.description: Collect questions about contributions, risks, and expectations without finalizing too early.

next_90_days.title: Next 90 days
next_90_days.description: Capture what has priority, what waits, and how you recognize progress.
